title: cyclamen europaeum subsp. orbiculatum
intro: Cyclamen europaeum subsp. orbiculatum is a subspecies of the perennial flowering plant, cyclamen europaeum, which is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Cyclamen europaeum subsp. orbiculatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
